developer_response.body: The reality is there will always be a silent majority — those who’ve shared plenty of joyful moments from Exorcism agency on YouTube. As developer we are also enjoy that moment. We won’t sacrifice the happiness of the many for the complaints of a very few. Hope you could find your free Phasmophobia all in one VR edition soon.

reviews.review_description:
This one is hard to review, I really wanted to like it but after playing a a few games with friends we realized the game needs to cook a little longer. 

The graphics are vr chat quality, the ghosts are just static resource models that move forward. For example one of the ghosts is a girl with black hair crawling on the floor except her arms she just glides across the floor. 

The game play mechanics seems like a good idea until they are not. Main gripe, flash lights,flashlights only work with the person using it, the other party members are in total darkness. Huh? I get it if you lose the flash lights or if the  fail, but only the person holding the light can see it? Made the game frustrating and annoying because if you are not holding the flashlight you are bored running in the dark. 

If you get spotted by a ghost you fail, then you are in the dark no matter what, just running around bored. Should be a spectator mode where you can watch the action at least. 

It’s a good concept and the game needs work. I cannot purchase a game that I can get for free on vr chat.  I hope the devs make it better for multiplayer, but right now this plays only as a single player game due to the mechanics with the flashlight.

developer_response.body:
Tks for provide such a long feedback. be honest we have to carefully calculate each percent of CPU and GPU to make the whole multiplay ghost hunting run. That means in a lot case we need to sacrify graphics experience to save multiplay object and logic sync first.  
0.For the girl crawing on the floor your mention no animation. We just make a test on that and see that was running well. each part of the ghost is moving right. The reason you see a not right sync animation highly possible due to network latency issue. which will stuck the animation sync from the game host (the one who create the room) to the game client (the one who join the room). 
1.For flash light only show on host side it was purely because the hardware performance limitation. Pls note accroding to oculus dev guide it was strictly set each scene only allow two real time lighting source. otherwise the FPS will drop to a unacceptable level. So if you wanna sync four player real time flash light in each player side. that means a hardware performance crash... If you like you can also double check ocuslus dev guide to verify if we are saying the truth. So this is not a stupid design but a current day real-life hardware performance limitation. hope you can understand it. 
2.For the Spectator mode. this is was a good suggestion. And we will consider to put it in coming update version. Tks on that
We know eveybody are expecting a high graphics quality also multiplayer ghost hunting game. But accroding to today's hardware performance level. especially we need also cover quest2 at same time. So till now it was the best balance we can make to support a multiplayer and hunting experience. We are and we will keep working on this game for the player who like this game. Hope you can enjoy it also or sth else by your thought.

It was a little confusing at the start, but once you get how it works. The game follows smoothly, but it can be a little buggy. I want to join in their Discord server, but it looks like it is dead.
I want to go a full 5 stars on this, and I want to see more of this game fully developed. Multi-player is hard to come by, but single-player is very hard, yet fun.

developer_response.body: In multiplayer mode, we’ve prepared two flashlights in the car’s trunk. Please update to version 1.5.2 to experience the improvements. If you need additional flashlights, we recommend purchasing them at the start or in the waiting lobby and retrieving them from the car’s trunk. We hope you enjoy the upgrade, and we’d greatly appreciate a 5-star rating for your feedback. Thank you!

reviews.review_title: An Okay Game, but it's only a Demo
reviews.review_description: The game is still in its demo, but the bugs are common in it, sometimes the EMP doesn't light up and you can't find the ghost. The ghost is Immortal and never goes away apparently, with the bugged EMP you can NEVER find the right room. But out of all of this, the game is okay and it's somewhat playable. What annoys me is the constant vibration when you hover over one object or your items and tablet, Devs should make a setting to disable vibration and have smooth turning.
